citations.claim: Runtime dependencies include Next.js, React, Zustand, TweetNaCl, and Privy for core functionality
Root layout provides authentication, theme, and analytics providers in nested context structure
Chat page component manages streaming AI conversations with authentication and model loading
Zustand store manages chat state with persistence and provides actions for message management
StreamChat function handles optional encryption, request sealing, and coordinator communication
Encryption system uses X25519 NaCl Box with ephemeral keypairs for forward secrecy
Authentication hook handles Privy integration with automatic API key provisioning
Chat API route proxies requests to coordinator with encryption and streaming support
Telemetry system batches events with buffering and automatic retry on network failures
AppShell provides main layout with sidebar navigation and toast notifications
HandleSend function manages chat flow including message creation and streaming API calls
Think block detection supports multiple model formats for reasoning display
Authentication flow handles key migration and automatic provisioning on login
Coordinator key fetching includes caching with TTL and URL-based cache invalidation
Provider dashboard fetches real-time machine status with 15-second refresh intervals
Privy provider configuration uses email-only login with dark theme customization
Google Analytics integration includes consent management and GDPR compliance
Certificate verification uses ASN1.js and PKI.js for hardware attestation validation
Next.js configuration ignores build errors due to viem dependency tree TypeScript issues
API routes pass through attestation and trust headers from coordinator responses
Trust metadata extraction includes hardware attestation details and Secure Enclave verification
